title: Add Colour to Automated Columns
excerpt:
On a board with automated items, there is no easy way to distinguish what auto populates / updates vs what is manual entry.

posts.author: JMack (J)
posts.cookedHtml:
On a board with automated items, there is no easy way to distinguish what auto populates / updates vs what is manual entry.

I want to add colour to the columns that have automated functions. To make a clear indication to users that it’s automated.

posts.author: jack456jokky (Jack Jokky)
posts.cookedHtml:
J:

On a board with automated items, there is no easy way to distinguish what auto populates / updates lhiproviderportal vs what is manual entry.

I want to add colour to the columns that have automated functions. To make a clear indication to users that it’s automated.

Color coding isn’t just a design choice; it’s a superhero cape for your data!
